post.content:
Round 1: This round had two questions and only one was covered due to time restrcitions. It started with introduction as usual. 

Question 1 : This is low level coding round. (Clearly NOT a system design)

```
Design and implement a Job Scheduling library with In-Memory DB. Multiple processes should be able to schedule and run the jobs parallely with the limit for no of jobs can be executed per process in configurable way.

Requirement
------------
1. APIs to schedule and monitor the job (P0)
2. Implementation of the Job execution should not use any open source library such as spring.
```
Though I had implemented the solution partially. 

Kindly Help on the solutions in comment below.

So, you create a child process and assign the jobs from parent to child & then somehow job status info is passed from child to parent. Parent will also keep track of overall assignment status & then re-assign if a process dies down.\nYou can use file system for communication or some form of pipe ?
Hy,\nIs this for L3 or L4?
